event: Interior of the Palazzo del Bargello in Florence
description: A detailed interior view of a medieval Italian palazzo courtyard showing a grand stone staircase ascending to an upper gallery. The walls are decorated with numerous heraldic shields and sculptural reliefs. Gothic arched galleries with columns run along the upper level. Two small figures in 19th-century dress stand at the base of the staircase, providing scale to the imposing architecture. The space is rendered in muted greys and browns, capturing the somber grandeur of the medieval stone interior.
